artPrompt: A solitary frosted-glass service window glows with cold cyan light at the end of an utterly empty beige corridor, a dusty ticket dispenser and a single worn stool standing before it. No clerk, no line, just humming fluorescent tubes vanishing toward a hazy point. Wide, lonely film-still composition emphasizing oppressive depth and stillness, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: The Permit Counter
text:
{T}: Add {W} or {U}.
{W}{U}, {T}: Tap target creature. It needs a permit first. (Form available at this window during posted hours, which are not now.)
flavorText: "Take a number." "There's no one else here." "Take a number."
